summary: refresh --all now refuses to silently truncate when quota < cert count; requires --accept-partial to proceed, and prints a stderr warning naming the dropped count.
reason: Previously `certs = certs[:q.Remaining]` silently truncated the cert list. A user running `refresh --all` on 500 cached coins with 200 quota would only see 200 refreshed with no signal that 300 were dropped. Greptile P1 finding on PR #630 (review 2). Mirrors coin batch's explicit `ran out of quota at row %d of %d; resume tomorrow.` stderr message.
